variables.notes: No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to COGS/cost of goods sold appears in the operating section above financial lines. Therefore D&A is assumed embedded in the selected parent row '[Income Statement] Cost of goods sold', so nothing should be added separately.

No explicit depreciation or amortisation row appears in the operating section for SG&A/administrative/other operating expenses, and there is no separate above-EBIT R&D expense row. Therefore D&A is assumed embedded in the selected XSGA component rows, so nothing should be added separately.
